name: Lapine Co., Ltd.
summary: Lapine Co., Ltd. engages in the produces, wholesales, and retails fashion apparel for women under the LAPINE brand in Japan. The company was formerly known as Daito Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Lapine Co., Ltd. in April 1967. Lapine Co., Ltd. was founded in 1950 and is based in Osaka, Japan.
